heading: Making and servicing of loans by personnel of State, county, or area committees
label: 2008k Making and servicing of loans by personnel of State, county, or area committees
text: The Secretary shall use personnel of a State, county or area committee established under to make and service loans under this chapter to the extent the personnel have been trained to do so.section 590h(b)(5) of title 16
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title III of , , , known as the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title III to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 87–12875 Stat. 307section 1921 of this titleAug. 8, 1961
